'''Norton''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] employee for the [[Azzameen family]] company [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] confiscated the business and its assets, he managed to escape from the structure.

==Behind the scenes==
Norton and fellow co-worker [[Ralph]] are the only two employees mentioned in-game. This is most likely a tribute to [[Wikipedia:The Honeymooners|The Honeymooners]]' main male characters, Ralph Kramden and Ed Norton.

==Appearances==
